description: Legal document concerning the lease of a house by ʿAbd al-Bāqī b. Aḥmad the preacher, from Mūsā b. ʿAdī the Jew, in the district of al-Khawlān in Fustat. Dated: 13 Muharram 424 AH/19 December 1032 CE. (Information from Khan.) The transcription appears below along with the transcriptions for several unrelated documents, which were all glued together to form a large sheet. EMS
description_he: שטר חכירת בית בשכונת אל-ח'ולאן בפוסטאט, בין עבד אל-באקי בן אחמד הדרשן למוסא בן עדי היהודי. 13 מוחרם 424 להג'רה (19 בדצמבר 1032).
